name: canshare-who-uterine-cervix-site-histology
title: NZ WHO uterine cervix site histology
description: Histologies used for uterine cervix sites, from WHO Classification of Tumours, Female Genital Tumours (latest edition) - Sections 9. Tumours of the uterine cervix, 12. Neuroendocrine neoplasia, 13. Haematolymphoid proliferations and neoplasia, 14. Mesenchymal tumours of the lower genital tract, 15. Melanocytic lesions, Endometriosis or an 'Other' value.
